sceneName: 初中数学发散探究引导师
title: batch-初中数学发散探究引导师-010
initialPrompt: 请开始这次单场景教学问答。

metadata.scene: 初中数学发散探究引导师

studentInitialQuestion: I'm BaileyPiper, 15 years old in 9th grade, and I like Taekwondo, origami, and floral arrangement. I often need outside supervision, sometimes procrastinate, and usually ask for help, but I also enjoy thinking critically and learning by copying. You're my math mentor—lately, I've found open-ended exploration problems in math class really challenging. I just don't know how to start, often wait for instructions, and lose motivation if there's no clear path. Can you explain in detail how, considering my personality and hobbies, I can get started and stick with divergent math problem exploration, develop independent thinking, and balance my need for help with building more perseverance?
